process.process:
1. any case created under a country different from the server’s actual location must be canceled and re-created with the correct country.

2. This is not limited to Drom-Com regions.

3. Ensure the Metrics tab is checked to verify the country originally associated with the case:

1. Exclude Morabanc and Andbanc (handled by Spain)
2. Use ship to customer = Yes
3. Only NBD delivery (2-3 days expected)

CMOS batteries are consumables and therefore not covered by any SLAs.

For environmental and cost reasons, they will only be shipped NBD from the NL DC from now on.

Please adjust your ordering behaviors accordingly.

For all countries, You have to add CC Airtel Kyndryl contacts:


Nowshaba.khan@kyndryl.com

Ashish.Tyagi@kyndryl.com

AA-VMware-support@kyndryl.com

puspa.singh@kyndryl.com


- Keep Lenovo SDM Mohamed Khan (mkhan10@lenovo.com) in CC on all communications related to Airtel cases.


- If any information or logs are pending from the Airtel/Kyndryl side, please send a reminder every 24 hours.


- For Offshore Airtel cases, please escalate to L3, if the first AP fails.

process.process:
- The primary contact is located in India.
- Send the part with SSR, ship it to the PUDO. Never send the part to the customer’s address.
- Confirm the machine location address and obtain a valid onsite phone contact before creating the WO.
- There is no need to order with SLA SBD, as it always takes time to deliver the part and assign the SSR.
